General.Name: Intelligent Monitoring Group Ltd
General.Description: Intelligent Monitoring Group Limited provides security, monitoring, and risk management services for businesses, homes, and individuals in Australia and New Zealand. It engages in security alarm and video monitoring, installations, and maintenance; and offers security guarding and personnel services. The company was formerly known as Threat Protect Australia Limited and changed its name to Intelligent Monitoring Group Limited in December 2021. The company is based in East Perth, Australia.
General.Address: 1 Tully Road, East Perth, WA, Australia, 6004
